message:
fix(session-types): disarm drop bomb before await to prevent panic on cancellation

All five transport-backed async methods (send_async, recv_async,
select_left_async, select_right_async, offer_async) had a cancel-
correctness bug: they called self.transport.take() before the await
point but did not disarm the drop bomb. If the future was cancelled
mid-await (e.g., as a race loser), the Chan would drop with
closed=false and transport=None, triggering a "SESSION LEAKED" panic
in debug builds.

Fix: set self.closed = true before the await point so cancellation
terminates the session cleanly. Re-arm (self.closed = false) only on
the success path before transition().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
